title: Hydraulic System Energy Loss Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to calculate total energy loss in hydraulic systems, identify loss drivers, and suggest improvement actions based on ISO 4409, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemden geçen hidrolik akışkanın hacimsel debisi. Endüstriyel sistemler için tipik aralık: 10-500 L/dak.

inputs.label: Total Pressure Drop
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all pressure losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all pressure losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşenler (borular, vanalar, bağlantı parçaları) genelindeki tüm basınç kayıplarının toplamı. ISO 4409, kararlı durumda ölçüm yapılmasını önerir.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of hydraulic fluid at operating temperature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of hydraulic fluid at operating temperature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma sıcaklığında hidrolik akışkanın yoğunluğu. Tipik mineral yağ: 850-900 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Kinematic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Fluid viscosity at operating temperature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fluid viscosity at operating temperature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma sıcaklığında akışkan viskozitesi. Endüstriyel hidrolikte ISO VG 46 yaygındır.

inputs.label: Total Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemdeki hidrolik boruların toplam uzunluğu. Uzun hatlar sürtünme kayıplarını artırır.

inputs.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Inner diameter of the main hydraulic pipe. Affects flow velocity and Reynolds number.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner diameter of the main hydraulic pipe. Affects flow velocity and Reynolds number.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana hidrolik borunun iç çapı. Akış hızını ve Reynolds sayısını etkiler.

inputs.label: Number of Valves
inputs.businessContext: Total number of directional, pressure, and flow control valves in the system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of directional, pressure, and flow control valves in the system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemdeki yön, basınç ve akış kontrol valflerinin toplam sayısı.

inputs.label: Number of Fittings
inputs.businessContext: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dirsek, te, redüksiyon ve diğer bağlantı elemanlarının toplam sayısı.

rules.message: Flow rate and pressure drop must both be positive for energy loss calculation.
Kinematic viscosity and pipe diameter must be positive to compute Reynolds number.
Pipe length must be non-negative and diameter positive.

thresholds.message: Total energy loss exceeds 5000 W. Immediate system audit recommended.
Flow is laminar (Re < 2000). Consider increasing flow or reducing viscosity to improve efficiency.
Darcy friction factor exceeds 0.04. Check for pipe roughness or undersized diameter.
Valve losses account for more than 30% of total loss. Review valve sizing and type.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
